user.title: Set up Concierge
user.description: Configure Concierge global orchestration settings. Choosing OpenAI means you are opting into a local/cloud hybrid.

data.name: Name
data.audit_archive_include_reference_excerpts: Include Reference Excerpts in audit archive

voice_enrollment_storage_missing.title: Voice enrollment storage is not configured
voice_enrollment_storage_missing.description: Concierge could not use external storage for voice enrollment. Failure code: {failure_code}. Provider: {provider_type}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

voice_enrollment_storage_unavailable.title: Voice enrollment storage is not available
voice_enrollment_storage_unavailable.description: Concierge could not reach the external voice enrollment storage. Failure code: {failure_code}. Provider: {provider_type}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

voice_enrollment_storage_not_writable.title: Voice enrollment storage is not writable
voice_enrollment_storage_not_writable.description: Concierge could not write to the external voice enrollment storage. Failure code: {failure_code}. Provider: {provider_type}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

voice_enrollment_storage_misconfigured.title: Voice enrollment storage is not policy compliant
voice_enrollment_storage_misconfigured.description: Concierge rejected the configured voice enrollment storage location. Failure code: {failure_code}. Provider: {provider_type}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

voice_enrollment_storage_recorder_confli.title: Voice enrollment storage conflicts with recorder storage
voice_enrollment_storage_recorder_confli.description: Concierge detected that the configured voice enrollment storage conflicts with recorder or database storage. Failure code: {failure_code}. Provider: {provider_type}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

voice_enrollment_storage_probe_failed.title: Voice enrollment storage readiness probe failed
voice_enrollment_storage_probe_failed.description: Concierge could not complete a safe readiness probe for external voice enrollment storage. Failure code: {failure_code}. Provider: {provider_type}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

voice_enrollment_cleanup_failed.title: Voice enrollment cleanup could not complete
voice_enrollment_cleanup_failed.description: Concierge could not complete voice enrollment cleanup. Cleanup reason: {cleanup_reason}. Result: {cleanup_result_code}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

voice_enrollment_orphan_cleanup_failed.title: Voice enrollment found abandoned session artifacts
voice_enrollment_orphan_cleanup_failed.description: Concierge found abandoned voice enrollment artifacts during startup reconciliation and could not fully clean them up. Failed cleanup count: {cleanup_failed_count}. Orphan count: {orphan_count}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

voice_enrollment_invalid_manifest.title: Voice enrollment session metadata is invalid
voice_enrollment_invalid_manifest.description: Concierge found invalid or unreadable voice enrollment session metadata during startup reconciliation. Invalid manifest count: {invalid_manifest_count}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

voice_enrollment_capture_provider_unavai.title: Voice enrollment provider is unavailable
voice_enrollment_capture_provider_unavai.description: Concierge could not reach the configured voice enrollment provider. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

voice_enrollment_capture_provider_unsupp.title: Voice enrollment provider is unsupported
voice_enrollment_capture_provider_unsupp.description: Concierge detected an unsupported voice enrollment provider configuration. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

person_context_unresolved.title: Person context is unresolved
person_context_unresolved.description: Concierge could not resolve a runtime person context and applied fail-closed person-aware routing. Active person state: {active_person_state}. Reason: {reason_code}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.

person_context_partial.title: Person context is partial
person_context_partial.description: Concierge resolved a person identity but required productivity bindings were incomplete or unavailable, so fail-closed person-aware routing remains disabled. Person: {resolved_person_id}. Active person state: {active_person_state}. Reason: {reason_code}. Last occurrence: {last_occurrence}.
